scenes.goal: Hook — make the viewer recognize the pain of manual deployment
scenes.visual: Dark canvas (#0D1117). Centered headline in monospace (#58A6FF) with soft blue glow. Subtle background grid fade-in.
scenes.text: Deploying should not take an afternoon.
scenes.motion: Headline fades in character-by-character (typewriter effect), background grid reveals with power3.out

scenes.goal: Reveal DeployBot as the solution with a bold value proposition
scenes.visual: Background shifts to slightly brighter (#161B22). Headline transitions to product name with accent color. Accent 2 (#3FB950) underline sweep.
scenes.text: DeployBot ships your code in 60 seconds.
scenes.motion: Previous headline fades out, new headline scales in with back.out(1.4). Green underline sweeps left-to-right.

scenes.visual: Left: feature icon (terminal window with green checkmark). Right: headline + description. Accent 2 (#3FB950) for success indicators.
scenes.text:
One-click deploy

Connect your repo, pick a branch, hit deploy. That's it.
scenes.motion: Feature icon draws in (stroke animation), text slides in from right. Checkmark pulses on emphasis.

scenes.visual: Two-column card layout. Left card: 'Instant Rollback' with undo icon. Right card: 'Preview Environments' with eye icon. Cards have subtle border (#30363D).
scenes.text:
Instant Rollback

One click to undo.

Preview Environments

See changes before they ship.
scenes.motion: Cards scale in sequentially from below (0.3s stagger). Icons rotate slightly on entrance.

scenes.visual: Three avatar circles overlapping, with notification badges. Below: team activity feed with timestamp indicators.
scenes.text:
Built for teams

Deploy approvals, activity feed, Slack notifications. Everyone stays in sync.
scenes.motion: Avatars fade in with bounce. Feed items scroll in one by one. Badges pulse.

scenes.goal: Drive sign-up with clear call to action
scenes.visual: Centered layout. Large CTA button on accent color (#58A6FF) with subtle glow. URL below in muted (#8B949E). Background returns to deep canvas.
scenes.motion: Button scales up from 0.8 to 1.0 with elastic.out. URL fades in after 1s delay.
scenes.audio: Music swells, then fades out with final accent hit
